generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mother and grandmother, I've always believed in supporting our troops. But have you seen how much of our defense budget is wasted on bloated contracts and unnecessary projects? We could strengthen our national security AND protect civil liberties if we just redirected that waste toward real preparedness. Our allies aren't pulling their weight - it's time we demand better accountability. #SupportOurTroopsWisely #DefendWithPurpose
